name: legal-pathways
description: Cross-border credential, licensing, and immigration pathway optimizer. Treats professional licensing boards, aviation authorities, and immigration systems as modular building blocks — finds the fastest, cheapest, and most legally robust pathway to your target credential or status. Built for ambitious professionals navigating international regulatory systems.

COURTLISTENER_API_KEY.description: CourtListener API key for US case law research (free at courtlistener.com/help/api/)

CONGRESS_API_KEY.description: Congress.gov API key for US legislation (free at api.congress.gov/sign-up/)

OECD_API_KEY.description: API key for OECD tax treaty database access

SEC_EDGAR_EMAIL.description: Email address for SEC EDGAR API rate limit identification

SINGAPORE_ELIT_API_KEY.description: API key for Singapore eLitigation access

TAIWAN_JUDICIAL_API_KEY.description: API key for Taiwan Judicial Yuan database access

EU_COMPLIANCE_API_KEY.description: API key for EU compliance database access

VAQUILL_API_KEY.description: API key for Vaquill AI semantic legal search (8M+ US opinions, USC, CFR)
